source_name: FDA Releasable 510(k) Database
project_use: Search comparator products by device name, product code, or 510(k) number; extract classification, product code, applicant, decision date, and summary availability
limits: A database hit does not mean this v0 demo is cleared, equivalent, or clinically validated

source_name: FDA Content of a 510(k)
project_use: Extract indications for use, device description, technological characteristics, comparison, and performance evidence categories from a named comparator summary
limits: Structure guide only; not a source for symptom-question content or triage thresholds

source_name: FDA Premarket Notification 510(k)
project_use: Expert-cited 510(k) boundary reference for substantial equivalence, intended use, predicate comparison, and the need for FDA clearance before marketing
limits: June demo may say comparable-product / 510(k) scope scan only; do not say predicate-equivalent, FDA-ready, 510(k)-ready, or cleared

source_name: FDA Clinical Decision Support Software FAQ
project_use: CDS boundary, multi-function product framing, transparency and independent-review framing
limits: Not a source for symptom questionnaire content or triage thresholds

source_name: FDA Clinical Decision Support Software Guidance January 2026
project_use: Expert-cited CDS boundary reference for Non-Device CDS criteria, HCP independent-review framing, patient/caregiver use, and device-function risk caution
limits: Not a source for symptom questionnaire content, vital thresholds, clinical validation, or triage thresholds; use only for claim and intended-use boundary

source_name: FDA Policy for Device Software Functions and Mobile Medical Applications September 2022
project_use: Risk-based software-function boundary for general-purpose platforms and device software functions
limits: Does not authorize clinical triage claims or production medical-device behavior for this demo

source_name: FDA Digital Health Policy Navigator Step 6
project_use: Intended-use and CDS-function boundary
limits: Navigator does not provide formal device determination or clinical question content

source_name: FDA Medical Device Cybersecurity
project_use: Connected-device and hospital-network cybersecurity boundary
limits: Does not authorize live HIS/EMR integration for this demo

source_name: FDA Cybersecurity in Medical Devices QMS Guidance
project_use: Boundary reference for connected-device cybersecurity and lifecycle security expectations
limits: Future productization context only; June demo still avoids production endpoints, real PHI, and client-side tokens

source_name: FDA Cybersecurity in Medical Devices QMS and Premarket Guidance
project_use: Expert-cited cybersecurity boundary reference for device design, labeling, and premarket documentation expectations when cybersecurity risk exists
limits: For June demo use only to require a demo-level threat boundary; does not approve production endpoint, live hospital integration, or token exposure

source_name: FDA/Health Canada/MHRA PCCP guiding principles for ML-enabled medical devices
project_use: Change-control reminder for future AI/ML updates
limits: Not needed for synthetic v0 unless claims move toward regulated AI-enabled device behavior

source_name: HHS HIPAA de-identification guidance
project_use: Privacy/de-identification boundary for future real health data
limits: V0 should avoid PHI entirely rather than rely on de-identification

source_name: Taiwan Personal Data Protection Act
project_use: Taiwan privacy boundary for personal data, medical records, healthcare data, and security maintenance obligations
limits: Supports synthetic-only demo boundary; not a substitute for legal review before any real patient-data path

source_name: Taiwan PDPC Personal Data Protection Act Article 6 enforcement-rule reference
project_use: Expert-cited Taiwan privacy boundary for medical records, healthcare data, physical-examination records, and security/maintenance measures
limits: V0 should remain synthetic-only; not approval to process real patient data, logs, screenshots, or raw audio

source_name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0
project_use: Govern/map/measure/manage framing for AI risk
limits: General AI risk framework, not medical triage logic

source_name: Emergency Nurses Association Emergency Severity Index Handbook 5th Edition
project_use: Emergency triage framework family and vital-sign reassessment concept
limits: Assumes trained clinical users; do not assign ESI level in v0

source_name: American Heart Association high blood pressure emergency guidance
project_use: BP plus emergency symptom question family
limits: Exact demo threshold and wording require clinician/company sign-off

source_name: American Heart Association heart attack warning signs
project_use: Chest discomfort, radiation, dyspnea, sweating, nausea, lightheadedness question family
limits: Does not diagnose ACS or determine EKG/triage level

source_name: CDC flu emergency warning signs
project_use: Fever/respiratory warning-sign question family
limits: Flu page does not cover all-cause fever or ED triage

source_name: CDC Signs and Symptoms of Flu

limits: Warning-sign context only; does not diagnose pneumonia, COVID, sepsis, or assign triage level

source_name: TW Core Observation Vital Signs profile

source_name: American Diabetes Association hyperglycemia

source_name: American Urological Association recurrent uncomplicated UTI guideline
